strategyOrder: Inspect the exact wrong region and its parent chain.
Fix parent/container ownership and top-level anchors first.
Then check CanvasScaler, size rules, and layout ownership.
Only after structure is stable, review asset choice or local spacing.
Re-verify with a screenshot before broadening scope.
repairPrompt: Repair the current Unity UI so it matches the reference image more closely for screen 'RewardPopup'.

issues.title: Top-level composition is shifted from the reference
issues.details: Foreground center delta is (-0.08, 0.03) with bbox IoU 0.51.
likelyFixes: Inspect parent container ownership before touching child offsets.
Check anchors and pivot for the suspect region.
Verify centered popup roots are still centered under the intended parent.
